brief.conversation: Generate exactly 1 scenario. Each role (roleAPhrases, roleBPhrases) must have 2-3 phrases maximum. Total interaction should fit within 2-3 minutes of class time.
brief.exercises: Generate 2-3 exercises maximum across all formats.
brief.grammar: Brief explanation only: 2-3 paragraphs, focus on the single key rule.
brief.reading: Short text (100-150 words) with 2-3 comprehension questions.
